channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mark Consuelos net worth and role as co-host on Live with Kelly and Mark
item.description: Mark Consuelos has been co-hosting the popular daytime talk show Live with Kelly and Mark alongside his wife Kelly Ripa since April 2023. The couple's natural chemistry has helped boost the show's rat...

item.title: Constitutional Court overturns ‘certificate of need’ rules controlling doctors’ placements
item.description: The Constitutional Court has struck down key provisions of the National Health Act that would have allowed the health minister to dictate where doctors may work, confirming a 2024 high court ruling th...

item.title: Challenges and Future of Media in a Digital World
item.description: Even though media in Tanzania and across Africa dey see big audiences and people dey consume content like never before, money side still dey suffer. Media houses dey produce plenty news and entertainm...

item.title: Senator Padilla attends Senate session amid Dela Rosa’s disappearance and ICC warrant
item.description: On May 18, 2026, Senator Robin Padilla returned to the Philippine Senate with his usual confident demeanor, but questions surrounding his ally, former police chief Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, rem...

item.title: Two Dead in Kiambu and Nakuru During Protests Against Fuel Price Increases
item.description: In Kenya today, protests against the recent sharp fuel price hike by the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority turned violent in several areas, leading to the death of at least two people in Kiamb...

item.title: Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe Sibanyoni’s extortion case removed from court roll
item.description: The high-profile extortion and money laundering case against Mpumalanga minibus taxi operator Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni and his co-accused—Mvimbi Masilela, Philemon Msiza, and Bafana Oupa Sindane—has be...

item.title: DCI Arrests Woman Over Gold Scam, Partner Escapes with Vehicle
item.description: Nairobi detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have arrested a woman suspected of masterminding a multi-million shilling gold scam targeting a foreign investor. The scammers ...

item.title: Julia Montes Experiences Double Nervousness Under Coco Martin's Direction in Sigabo Scene
item.description: In a recent behind-the-scenes glimpse shared by ABS-CBN, popular actress Julia Montes opened up about her feelings while working on the upcoming series Sigabo. Montes admitted she felt 'doble-dobleng ...

item.title: Andy Burnham leverages Labour dissatisfaction in Makerfield byelection
item.description: In the Makerfield byelection, Labour leader Keir Starmer is cast in an unusual role, essentially serving as a focal point for voters’ dissatisfaction with the party rather than its champion. Many loca...

item.title: Rev. Franklin Graham Criticized for Speech at Trump's National Prayer Event
item.description: At the Rededicate 250 event held at the National Mall in Washington, D.C., Rev. Franklin Graham delivered a pre-recorded video message expressing strong criticism of America's moral state. He describe...

item.title: A Look at Betty Hutton’s Career and Iconic Portraits from the 1940s
item.description: Betty Hutton, born Elizabeth June Thornburg on February 26, 1921, was a multi-talented American performer known for her work as an actress, singer, dancer, and comedian. She became a major star in the...

item.title: Court Rules Nketoana Municipality Workers Were Employed Irregularly
item.description: Seventy-four general workers employed by Nketoana local municipality in the Free State have lost their jobs after the Bloemfontein High Court ruled their appointments unlawful. The municipality had ad...

item.title: APC Confirms Aliero, Abdullahi, and Gajere as Senatorial Candidates in Kebbi for 2027 Elections
item.description: For Kebbi State, the ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) don finally sort out their senatorial candidates for the 2027 elections through consensus. Senator Muhammad Aliero wey dey represent Kebbi C...

item.title: Supreme Court Points Out Error in Its Earlier Order Denying Bail to Umar Khalid and Sharjeel Imam
item.description: In a significant development, the Supreme Court of India has criticised its own January verdict that had denied bail to activists Umar Khalid and Sharjeel Imam in the Delhi riots conspiracy case. A be...

item.title: Documents Show Uber’s Lobbying Efforts Influenced Halifax Ride-Hailing Oversight Decisions
item.description: Newly released documents reveal that Uber engaged in extensive lobbying efforts in Halifax regarding proposed changes to ride-hailing driver oversight. The documents indicate that Uber lobbyist Jonath...

item.title: Circle of Wonders: Exploring Family, Dying, and the Fragility of Human Connections
item.description: Kathryn Heyman’s novel, Circle of Wonders, delves into the intricate and often uncomfortable realities of dying within a fractured family. Set across a lunar cycle, the story focuses on Roni, a woman ...

item.title: Spanish court acquits Shakira of 2011 tax fraud, orders €55 million refund pending appeal
item.description: After almost ten years of legal battle, a Spanish court has finally acquitted popular Colombian singer Shakira of tax fraud charges relating to 2011. The judges ruled that the tax authorities could no...

item.title: Lululemon and Founder Chip Wilson Fail to Reach Settlement Over Board Appointments
item.description: Lululemon Athletica recently announced that negotiations with its founder, Chip Wilson, have broken down due to what the company described as escalating demands. According to a regulatory filing, Lulu...

item.title: Defence Minister Khawaja Asif warns India of severe consequences over any future misadventure
item.description: Defence Minister Khawaja Asif has issued a strong warning to India, stating that any misadventure against Pakistan would result in India being relegated to history with its geography changed. In an in...

item.title: Youths, APC supporters rally for Tinubu’s re-election and Yishawu in Lagos
item.description: Plenty youths and faithful supporters of APC don gather recently for solidarity waka to show support for the re-election of President Bola Ahmed Tinubu and Gbolahan Olusegun Yishawu, wey dey represent...
